title: Silky Smoked Ethiopian Chicken Stir-fry
description: An earthy and silky solo-dinner ethiopian dish featuring tender chicken thighs in a smoke-infused sauce without eggs.

ingredients.name: 4 skinless bone-in chicken thighs
ingredients.notes: ensure safe cooking temperatures are met

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons smoked paprika
ingredients.notes: ensure safe cooking temperatures are met

ingredients.name: 1 teaspoon ground cumin
ingredients.notes: ensure safe cooking temperatures are met

instructions: Season chicken with salt and pepper.
Place chicken on a baking sheet. Bake for about 15-20 minutes or until cooked through, turning once halfway through.
Meanwhile, in a wok or large skillet, sauté onions until translucent.
Add garlic and bell peppers; cook for an additional minute.
Stir in tomatoes, smoked paprika, cumin, and any optional fresh herbs. Simmer gently to allow flavors melding.
Return chicken to the pan with sauce, tossing gently to coat evenly.
Garnish with fresh parsley if desired.
